asr.name: whisper.cpp
asr.weights_note: Use OpenAI Whisper converted ggml/gguf weights. Verify the selected model file license before redistribution.

translation.name: Marian NMT
translation.weights_note: Translation model weights are model-specific. Do not redistribute until the exact model card license is checked.

translation.name: Argos Translate
translation.weights_note: Argos language packages are model artifacts. Do not commit downloaded packages; keep them under VOICE_BRIDGE_MODEL_ROOT/argos or user cache.

speaker_encoder.name: WeSpeaker ERes2Net-large
speaker_encoder.weights_note: Use Voice Bridge's lightweight WeSpeaker ERes2Net runner via --eres2net. Runtime is pinned to Python 3.11 + torch/torchaudio 2.5.1. Optional avg_model.pt/config.yaml can be placed under VOICE_BRIDGE_MODEL_ROOT/speaker/wespeaker/eres2net-large. Do not commit weights.

speech_decoder.name: VoxCPM2
speech_decoder.weights_note: Use openbmb/VoxCPM2 through the voxcpm package. Keep model weights under VOICE_BRIDGE_MODEL_ROOT/voxcpm2 or the Hugging Face cache and do not commit weights.

speech_decoder.name: Qwen3-TTS 0.6B Base
speech_decoder.weights_note: Use Qwen/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-Base through a separate qwen-tts runtime. Keep model weights under VOICE_BRIDGE_MODEL_ROOT/qwen3-tts/0.6B-base and do not commit weights.
